title: CI transient ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND from pnpm cache corruption
body: CI runs 27188174510 and 27201508477 failed with 'Cannot find package @/...' errors for path aliases in unit tests. The latest CI run (27302135889) passed all gates. Root cause: transient pnpm store/cache corruption in the CI runner, not a code issue. Same commit passes locally (193 test files, 2489 tests). No code changes were needed.
rationale: If this pattern recurs, CI cache invalidation should be the first troubleshooting step before investigating code changes.
